steps.action: Inspect src/ usage of EVENT_TIMEZONE and toLocale* calls
steps.expected: Date/time-formatting files import and use the shared constant
steps.observed: All files containing toLocaleDateString/toLocaleTimeString reference EVENT_TIMEZONE; 11 files with calls, 0 missing constant.

assertions.title: Landing page info modal shows correct Eastern time

steps.expected: Info modal opens with event date/time details
steps.observed: Modal opened and displayed date plus time range: `4:00 PM – 12:00 AM`.

steps.expected: Modal time uses toLocaleTimeString with timeZone from shared constant
steps.observed: Both start and end time formatters include `timeZone: EVENT_TIMEZONE`.

assertions.title: All date/time formatting calls specify timezone

steps.action: Scan src for all toLocaleTimeString/toLocaleDateString calls
steps.expected: Every call includes a timeZone option using the shared constant
steps.observed: 20 calls detected across src; automated check found 0 calls missing `timeZone`.

steps.action: Cross-check expected file list from contract
steps.expected: Listed files with formatting calls are covered and use timezone
steps.observed: All listed files with toLocale* calls include `timeZone: EVENT_TIMEZONE` (including index, events, emails, sms, admin pages, collaborator page, reminder routes).

assertions.title: SMS RSVP confirmation uses timezone for date formatting

steps.expected: toLocaleDateString includes timeZone with shared constant
steps.observed: File imports EVENT_TIMEZONE and uses `timeZone: EVENT_TIMEZONE` in the SMS date formatter.

assertions.title: Day-of reminder send route uses timezone

steps.expected: toLocaleDateString includes timeZone with shared constant
steps.observed: Route imports EVENT_TIMEZONE and uses it in the `Already sent on ...` date formatting branch.

assertions.title: Info modal shows correct time with consistent colors

steps.action: Open Info modal on landing page
steps.expected: Modal shows event time and uses standardized palette
steps.observed: Modal showed `4:00 PM – 12:00 AM`; annotated screenshot captured the open state.

steps.action: Inspect computed styles for modal backdrop/sheet/text
steps.observed: Computed styles: sheet background `rgb(245, 243, 240)`, text `rgb(26, 24, 22)`, backdrop `rgba(26, 24, 22, 0.55)`, sheet shadow `rgba(26, 24, 22, 0.25) ...`.

steps.action: Check browser runtime errors after modal flow
